message:
test(umask): expand from 7 to 18 tests for umask process-global state management (wa-41oi5)

Add 11 new tests covering: saved_umask value capture with various initial masks,
sequential create/drop cycle independence, nested saver saved_umask updates,
drop restoration from zero/maximally-restrictive/odd mask values, default vs new
equivalence, saver with already-restrictive mask, and non-unix platform safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
